description_long: This is a stylized human male figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms extending horizontally from the shoulders, creating an unusual and striking silhouette. The figure has a muscular upper body with a defined chest and visible facial features, including a stern expression. The lower body is depicted in a crouched or squatting position, with both knees bent and feet flat on the ground, giving the impression of readiness or tension. The figure appears to be minimally clothed, wearing only a pair of shorts, and has bare feet. The skin texture is smooth and the overall form is simplified, lacking fine anatomical details such as fingers or toes. The asset's proportions and pose are highly unconventional, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A stylized male figure with extremely long arms, muscular torso, and crouched posture, wearing shorts and barefoot. The exaggerated proportions and minimal clothing create a unique, attention-grabbing appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, muscular chest, and the full extension of the arms, as well as the bent knees and bare feet.
description_view_1: Side view is mostly obscured, showing a close-up of the skin texture with little detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the head, shoulders, and the long arms extending outward, with the back and legs visible in silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is also mostly obscured, showing a close-up of the skin texture similar to view 1.
